titleStmt.title: SII 11.175: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 175. (B.K. No. 69 of 1927-28.) DAMBAḶ, MUṆḌARGI PĒṬHĀ, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON THE BACK OF THE IMAGE OF THE GOD MĀRUTI IN THE MĀRUTI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and introduces his subordinate Permabhūpa as the governor of Māsavāḍi-nāḍd It states that a certain Ajjaya-Nāyaka, son of Rebbarasa and Bāvikabbe, constructed a temple of Śiva at Dharmavoḷal to which Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Hermmāḍiyarasa granted land after purchase from the Sixteen Śeṭṭis and the Nagaras of Dharmavoḷal. Mention is made of Nirvāṇaśakti-Paṇḍitadēva and of his disciple whose name is lost.

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 49, Krōdhi, Māgha, puṇṇami, Monday, Uttarāyāṇa-saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta, probably corresponding to A.D. 1126, January, 11, Monday. The Uttarāyaṇa-sankrānti had, however, occurred on 24th December, A.D. 1125. Both the Chāḷukya-Vikrama year and the cyclic year were expired ones. In Krōdhi (= Śaka 1046), Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti occurred on Wednesday, following Monday, the pūrṇimā of the month Pausha and not Māgha as cited in the inscription. The English equivalent of the date would in this case be Wednesday, December 24, A.D. 1124.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājya muttarōttarābhivridhdhipravardhdhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . © śrīmatkuṁ
taḷabhūmikāminiya vaktrādarśamaṁ pōltu sadhdhāmaṁ śōbhege māsavāḍi yeseguṁ nāḍaṁtadaṁ
kāminīkāmaṁ bhūpalalāma nugraripubhīmaṁ śiṣṭakōṭikritaprēmaṁ pāḷisutirppa nalte nayadiṁ
śrīpermmabhāpāḷaka . Ātena parākrama madeṁtane . baḷavadarātiyaṁ kiḍipude naḍuchōdya
me permmabhūbhujaṁ muḷido ḍadēna neṁbe nele sāhasamaṁ kuḷaparvvataṁgaḷaṁ kaḷakuḷa māgi poyyane diśā
gajamaṁ piḍidotti daṁtamaṁ kīḷane samudramaṁ kadaḍi karddamamaṁ neṟe māḍi tōṟane . keḍadapāyaṁ
gaḷiṁ musalaghātadi narggida sindhuraṁgaḷiṁ duḍida rathaṁgaḷiṁ kuṇiva vīrakabandhakadaṁbakaṁgaḷiṁ daḍagina
rāśiyiṁ pariva netta rapaḷḷadi nalli nōḍa nōrppaḍa mantidāytu permmanṛpa nāntiṟi dugramahā
havāṁgaṇa . kaṁda . Idu māḷava naṭṭida maṇiyidu cōḷika naṭṭi daśva mintidu pāṁcāḷada nṛpa
naṭṭida gaja meṁbudu ghōṣaṇe permmanṛpana rājālayadoḷ . va . Ātaniṁ parīkṣyamā girddamā
sevāḍināḍige kaṭṭida paṭṭamu miṭṭa boṭṭumaḷavaṭṭa kaḷaśamu mirppaṁte dharmmavoḷaleṁ ba mahāpaṭṭa
ṇaṁ virājisu�tirppu dadaṟa mahimeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . v® . sarasijaṣaṁḍadiṁ baḷeda nandanadiṁ na
vagaṁdhaśāḷiyiṁ daritarutirppa nirjjharadi nāḍuva haṁsagaḷiṁ viḷāsadiṁ suruciramāgi kēguva navilga
ḷi nōḍuva rājakīradiṁ karame manōharaṁ poṟavoḷalu paribhāvisa tatpurēṁdrada . matta malli . kaṁda .
manuvaṁ maṟeyisu vuttamamunināthari nābhijātyadiṁ kamaḷejanaṁ neneyisuva dharāmara riṁ danavarataṁ dha
rmmavoḷala dēṁ sūgayisitō . va . Iṁtu sogayisuva dharmmavoḷala mahāprabhu gaḷappa padinaṟuvara ma
himeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . kaṁ . haracaraṇakamaḷasēvanapāvaka rkkaraṁ bhāvakarī dhareyoḷivareṁdu pa
dinaḻuvara natimudadiṁde budhajanaṁ baṇnisuguṁ . va . Avariṁ parirakṣyamāgi sakalaśōbhegaṁ tāne janmabhavana
menisi karnnāṭabhūmibhāminīmadhyadēśakke viśadamauktikamanōhārihāradantirdda dharmmavoḷaloḷ .
kaṁ . vinayada kaṇi dayege nikētana miṣṭaviśiṣṭakōṭikalpamahījaṁ manucāritraṁ sajja navi
nutaṁ rebbarasa neseda nepagataduritaṁ . Ātana kuḷavadhu bhuvanakhyāte samastavyapāstadha
najana dhana saṁbhote nijagōtrapūte mahītaḷadoḷ bāvikabbeyeṁba ḷpesariṁ . Avarirvvarigaṁ naṁ
dana navitathayaśa nakhiḷavibudhajanasurataru bāndhavakumudakumudinībāṁdhava najjayanā
yakaṁ samaṁ tudayisida . Ātana mahimeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . para rggupakāraṁgeyvude varaśīḷaṁ sa
tyavacanama nilipudē nirbhbharadiṁ bage gaḍidēṁ surucira majjayanāyakaṁ mahātmanō jagado
ḷ . trinayanapadapaṁkajamaṁ kanasinoḷaṁ kaṇḍu kanavanippaṁ bharadiṁde namaḥ śivāya maṁtra ma ne
na lārddore yajjimayyanoḷ śivabhaktar . va . Intu pogarttegaṁ negarttegaṁ tāne janma bhūmiyāgirddu
taṁna pogartteya nanvartthaṁ māḍaluṁ nijabhujāvaṣṭambhadiṁ nyāyōpārjjitavittamaṁ pavitram
māḍaleṁdu dharmmavoḷa laiśānyadiśābhāgadoḷ śivabhavanamaṁ māḍisida nadentappu
deṁdaḍe . kuḷaparvvatamaṁ taṁdadanaḷavigevare kaḍedu paḍeda renisiyu maṁtāpoḷaliṁge kaḷaśadaṁ
tire viḷāsamaṁ tāḷdi ttajjamēśvarabhavanaṁ . Ā dēvadēvōttamaṁge . © svasti śrīma ccāḷukyavikramavarṣa
da 49 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada māghada puṇname sōmavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁ
krāṁti vyatīpātadandu śrīmadhdharmavoḷala padinaṟuvarsseṭṭiyargga mahānagaraṁgaḷgaṁ pādapūje
yaṁ koṭṭu koṁḍa mūḍalu honakuṟuvadalli tōṁṭa matta roṁdu mahāmaṁḍaḷē śvaraṁ hermmāḍiyarasa Ā
lahāḷa holadalu biṭṭa yirppatu matarkkeyyumaṁ . kaṁ . mīṟade mada mēṟade taledōṟa
de saytirppaḍirkke vidyābaḷamaṁ tōṟidoḍe nosala kaṇnaṁ tōṟane nirvvāṇaśaktipaṁḍita dēvaṁ mū
ṟuṁ jagamuṁ neraḍaṟunūṟumukhaṁberasu tarkkakarkkaśatanamaṁ tōṟidoḍe nosala kaṇnaṁ tō
ṟane nirvvāṇaśaktipaṇḍitadēvaṁ . Antavara śiṣyarappa . © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyā yadhyānadhā
raṇamōnānuṣṭāṇajapaṣaḍaṁgōpahārādisaṁpanna ranēkatarkkavyākaraṇa
purāṇakāvyanāṭakabharatavātsyāyanādividyāsārāsāravicāracāracaturaca
turānana rudhdhataprabudhdhabauddhabudhabōdhāmbōdhyaśēṣaśōṣaṇaurvvānaḷaruṁ sakaḷajaga tu
kartrutvādi cikīruṣākuḷakudharavidaḷanō saṁva
khyātābhikhya prakhyāta
The rest of the
Digital edition of SII 11.175 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
